urgent.data: Brand policy is early March 2026, but prior public messaging included Feb 25.
urgent.action: Standardize all pages/metadata/schema/GBP to 'Opening Early March 2026'.
Rewrite title/meta on top pages for local intent (Waikiki, menu, address, opening timing).

urgent.data: HTTP and HTTPS variants both appearing in search data.
urgent.action: Force 301 HTTP→HTTPS and unify canonical/hreflang to HTTPS only.

quickWins.data: Homepage CTR is relatively strong; subpages underperform.
quickWins.action: Replicate homepage value proposition in subpage titles/meta.

quickWins.data: /en/menu has impressions but weak click conversion.
quickWins.action: Add clearer menu-specific SERP copy + FAQ/menu schema.

quickWins.data: Lighthouse mobile score ~62 with LCP ~8.1s on /en.
quickWins.action: Compress hero assets, prioritize above-the-fold render, lazy-load non-critical media.

opportunities.action: Expand KR/JP/EN pages around Waikiki breakfast/dessert intent with map + address + opening language.
Build stronger local landing sections for donut/coffee near me with structured FAQ and transport cues.
Improve links from homepage to top menu/category pages using intent-rich anchors.

insights.insight: Ranking is acceptable; conversion is weak
insights.evidence: Avg position 6.6 with low CTR indicates snippet-intent mismatch.

insights.insight: Desktop is healthy, mobile is bottleneck
Brand terms convert better than generic terms
insights.evidence: Branded queries produce most clicks; non-branded/local terms need stronger messaging.
